rationale: Build is green and the real-binary R1-R4 probes pass: non-bead stale targets block without bead/ leakage, deleted targets warn against the named target, --gate stamps/resolves/rejects correctly, the JS $ regex and mirror check pass, R4 targeted test passes, and bead panels still behave as bead panels. However the required literal `go test ./...` run is red for failures beyond the brief's only allowed `internal/instruct TestRun_IdleNoBeads` failure, so I cannot approve the whole branch.
concrete_changes_required: Make the default `go test ./...` run pass in this review environment, or change the LLM harness default skip/auth detection so unauthenticated Claude Code does not make the whole suite red; then rerun `go test ./...` successfully with no failures beyond any explicitly accepted flake.

findings.title: Full suite fails outside the allowed internal/instruct flake
findings.output: internal/harness failed multiple TestLLM_* scenarios with agent output `Not logged in · Please run /login`; the package then timed out after 10m while running TestLLM_SpecInit. internal/instruct TestRun_IdleNoBeads also failed as described in the brief. An initial internal/specgate failure was environmental module-cache warm-up and passed after copying local transitive module metadata.
findings.evidence: The full-suite command exited 1. A deterministic `go test -short ./...` rerun after warming module metadata failed only internal/instruct, and `go test ./internal/specgate -run TestNoAgentmindInDepGraph -v` passed.
